trust.title: Why Agencies Hire Clyde
trust.customBuilt: Persistent memory per client. Clyde studies brand voice, audience and performance history — sharper every week, isolated per brand.
trust.founderAccess: Max 20 agencies per year. Personal onboarding by Daley. No self-service — every client is a partnership.
trust.successGuarantee: SkinClarity Club already runs 3 Instagram accounts × 4 brands × multiple content types autonomously. Whatever your client portfolio looks like, Clyde adapts.
trust.trialCommitment: Self-hosted infrastructure on European servers. GDPR + EU AI Act ready. Your data stays yours.

icp.title: Which agencies are we building Clyde for?
icp.subtitle: No marketing pitch. Read it honestly: we would rather not work with everyone.
icp.fit1: Agencies with 5-30 FTE serving 10-50 brands, looking to scale without extra headcount
icp.fit2: Marketing operators who work data-driven and treat content as a growth strategy
icp.fit3: Founders looking for a partner, not a tool — willing to recalibrate workflows, not just execute them
icp.fit4: NL/EU-first agencies that value data residency and GDPR/EU AI Act compliance
icp.notFitTitle: Probably not the right match if
icp.notFit1: You have less than EUR 300K annual revenue — the budget does not fit and we do not want to slow your growth
icp.notFit2: You do pure branding, identity or creative — Clyde delivers performance content, not design work
icp.notFit3: You are looking for set-and-forget — Clyde learns from you, which requires 4 weeks of onboarding and ongoing input
icp.notFit4: You run an agency with >30 FTE and your own AI/tech team — we build for agencies that want to accelerate, not enterprises that build in-house

cta.title: Ready to meet Clyde?
cta.subtitle: Max 20 agencies per year. {taken} of {total} founding spots taken. Book a call — we will discuss together whether Clyde fits your portfolio.

q1.question: How is Clyde different from ChatGPT or Jasper?
q1.answer: ChatGPT and Jasper are generic tools without memory — you need to supply context with every prompt. Clyde has persistent memory per client: brand voice, audience, performance history and preferences stay retained. Plus: Clyde orchestrates 12 specialized skills (social, blogs, voice, ads, SEO, analytics), not just text. One brain with shared memory, not a separate tool per task.

q2.question: What if I want to cancel?
q2.answer: Zero lock-in. Your data is always exportable (JSON + CSV) within 24 hours. Self-hosted infrastructure on EU servers means we do not wrap your data in proprietary formats — everything Clyde learns about your clients is yours. On cancellation you get 30 days for full export before we decommission your workspace.

q3.question: Why an application gate? Why no self-service?
q3.answer: Clyde is a high-touch AI partnership, not a SaaS tool. Every client gets personal onboarding by Daley (founder) and 4 weeks of partnership setup. We accept max 20 new agencies per year. The application is not to reject you — it is to check whether we are both the right match. Generic sign-up does not fit what we deliver.

q4.question: Exactly how many skills do I get?
q4.answer: Twelve total: 9 live (Social Media, Blog Factory, Ad Creator, Voice Agent, Lead Qualifier, Reporting, SEO/GEO, Research, Clyde orchestrator) and 3 coming_soon (Reel Builder, Email Management, ManyChat DM). Skill availability varies per tier — Partner has 8 skills + 2 add-on paths, Growth/Pro/Enterprise/Founding have all 12 with caps on the more expensive skills (voice, video, reels).

q5.question: Why does this work better for agencies than separate tools?
q5.answer: Because it is one brain with shared memory, not 12 separate tools. What Clyde learns about client X in social media, it automatically uses in their blogs and ad creative. Cross-skill learning is impossible with separate tools — you lose context at every handover. One AI employee for your entire portfolio means patterns and data travel between skills.

trustStrip.title: Built with and for Dutch agencies and brands
trustStrip.subtitle: SkinClarity Club — our first Founding partner — has been running fully autonomously on Clyde for months.

q1.question: What makes an AI chatbot different from a rule-based chatbot?
q1.answer: AI chatbots use large language models to understand intent and generate contextual responses, while rule-based bots follow fixed decision trees. AI chatbots handle novel questions without pre-programmed paths.

q2.question: Can I try the chatbot before purchasing?
q2.answer: Yes — our Chatbots page features a live demo playground with 3 pre-configured personas: e-commerce, lead generation, and customer support.

q3.question: How do you configure the chatbot's persona?
q3.answer: Each chatbot receives a system prompt, tone guidelines, knowledge base documents, and example conversations. Configuration typically takes 3-5 business days for a production-ready persona.

q4.question: Does the chatbot integrate with my CRM?
q4.answer: Yes — chatbot-captured leads are routed directly to HubSpot, Salesforce, or your CRM via webhook. We configure the field mapping during onboarding.

q5.question: What languages does the chatbot support?
q5.answer: The underlying models support 50+ languages. We configure and test for your primary languages (EN/NL/ES as standard) during deployment.

q6.question: Is the chatbot GDPR compliant?
q6.answer: Yes — all conversation data is processed within EU data centers, chat history is not retained beyond the session by default, and we provide a DPA on request.

meta.title: About FutureMarketingAI | AI Marketing Employee for Agencies
meta.description: FutureMarketingAI builds persistent AI Marketing Employees for marketing agencies. One agent, pluggable skills, always learning. Built in the Netherlands for European agencies.

hero.title: About FutureMarketingAI
hero.tagline: Building the first AI Marketing Employee for agencies

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To give every marketing agency access to an AI employee that handles execution — so agency teams can focus on strategy, creativity, and client relationships. We believe agencies should scale by adding skills to their AI employee, not by hiring more juniors.
mission.why_text: We ran marketing operations ourselves and saw the same problem every agency faces: too many clients, too much repetitive work, not enough hours. So we built the AI employee we wished we had — one that learns each client's brand, works 24/7, and gets better every week.

assisted.title: AI-Assisted Era
assisted.description: Agencies adopted ChatGPT and AI tools for faster content drafts and research, but still needed humans to coordinate everything. Tools helped, but did not execute.

autonomous.title: AI Employee Era
autonomous.description: Persistent AI agents that execute full workflows autonomously. Your AI employee creates content, manages social, qualifies leads, and reports results — without supervision. This is where early-adopter agencies gain an insurmountable advantage.

standard.title: Standard Practice
standard.description: Every agency has AI employees. The agencies that started early have 2-3 years of compounding AI learning, making their agents significantly better than newcomers.

key_message.title: Early-adopter agencies gain a 2-3 year competitive advantage
key_message.description: Just like early adopters of programmatic advertising or marketing automation — the compounding effect of AI learning means starting now creates an advantage that late movers cannot close.

cta.title: Become a Founding Member
cta.description: We are onboarding our first 10 founding member agencies at EUR 997/mo. Lock in the lowest price and help shape the product.

meta.title: Pricing — 5 tiers. Transparent. From Partner €347 to Enterprise €7.997 | FutureMarketingAI
meta.description: Premium AI marketing partnership — 5 tiers with skill caps, credit allocations and add-on packs. No hidden costs, no self-service. Max 20 agencies per year.

hero.title: Premium partnerships. 5 tiers. Transparent.
hero.description: All prices visible. 5 tiers for any portfolio size — from solo operator to enterprise. Skill-gating honestly explained, no hidden costs, no contact-us-for-pricing.

visibility.title: Why our prices are visible
visibility.body: With premium AI partners we often see "Contact us for pricing" — that undermines the relationship before it starts. We prefer to show what Clyde costs, what you get and what caps apply, so you can judge whether the investment fits. No sales dance needed.

partner.name: Partner
partner.subtitle: For solo operators
partner.tagline: 1 workspace. 8 skills included + 2 add-on paths. No Voice/Video/Reel.
partner.description: The entry tier for solo marketing operators who want to use Clyde for one own practice or one client. Low entry, capped usage — perfect to taste the partnership model without big commitment.
partner.features_2: Social Media, Blog Factory, Lead Qualifier
partner.features_9: No Voice Agent, Video Ads or Reel Builder

growth.name: Growth
growth.subtitle: For small agencies
growth.tagline: 5 workspaces. All 12 skills. Caps on expensive skills.
growth.description: For agencies with 1-5 clients wanting to use Clyde as a full marketing employee. All 12 skills available with tier caps on the more expensive ones (voice, video, reels).

professional.name: Professional
professional.subtitle: For mid-size agencies
professional.tagline: 15 workspaces. Wider caps. Slack support + monthly strategy call.
professional.description: For agencies with 5-15 clients running seriously on Clyde. Wider caps, Slack access to Daley, monthly strategy call.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.subtitle: For large agencies
enterprise.tagline: Unlimited workspaces + skills. White-label + API access. Dedicated CSM + SLA.
enterprise.description: For agencies with 15+ clients using Clyde as core infrastructure. White-label, API access, dedicated customer success manager with SLA.

founding.name: Founding
founding.subtitle: 10 spots — lifetime deal
founding.tagline: 10 spots total. Pro-level caps. Lifetime €997. Founder Slack.
founding.description: The founding clients who committed pre-launch. Lifetime price €997, Pro-level skill caps, direct Slack contact with Daley. {taken} of {total} spots taken.

matrix.title: Skill availability per tier
matrix.subtitle: Which skill in which tier — and with what cap. Honest, transparent, documented.
matrix.legend: Numbers are monthly caps per workspace. "Fair use" = unlimited with throttle on extreme outliers. "Add-on" = available via skill pack, not in base tier.

creditPacks.title: Credit packs — top-ups for swing months
creditPacks.description: Not enough credits in your tier this month? Top up with a credit pack. No automatic upsell, no obligation.

skillPacks.title: Skill-specific packs — targeted add-ons
skillPacks.description: One skill against the cap? Buy a skill pack for that specific skill, instead of a full tier upgrade.

q1.question: Why skill caps instead of "all skills unlimited"?
q1.answer: Voice, Video Ad and Reel Builder are the most expensive skills in credit usage (5-25 cr per action). Unlimited on all tiers would either lead to astronomical prices or to fair-use throttling behind the scenes. Caps keep costs predictable and give each tier a natural upgrade trigger.

q2.question: What happens if I exceed my credits or caps?
q2.answer: You get warnings at 80% and 100% of your monthly allocation. Then you can choose: wait until next month, buy a credit pack (Partner Top-Up €39 to Unlimited €697), or upgrade to a higher tier. No automatic overage, no surprise on your invoice.

q3.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade between tiers?
q3.answer: Upgrading is possible anytime with prorated billing. Downgrading happens at the next billing cycle. From Founding to lower is not possible — your Founding price is lifetime as long as you stay active.

q4.question: Do I get all 12 skills or a subset?
q4.answer: Partner has 8 skills included + 2 add-on paths (static ads + ManyChat). Growth / Professional / Enterprise / Founding have all 12 skills available, with tier caps on the more expensive ones. Voice / Video Ad / Reel Builder are not available on Partner — for those go to Growth.

q5.question: What does the onboarding fee cover?
q5.answer: The one-time onboarding fee covers 4 weeks of partnership setup by Daley: brand voice intake per client, KPI definitions, skill configuration, test runs and approval workflow setup. This is not a technical installation fee — it is investment in a working AI employee.

meta.title: Legal | Future Marketing AI
meta.description: Legal information, terms of service, privacy policy, and cookie policy for Future Marketing AI.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Future Marketing AI (FutureMarketingAI) platform and AI Marketing Employee services. By subscribing to or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. FutureMarketingAI operates as an Agent as a Service (AaaS) provider, delivering persistent AI agents with pluggable marketing skills to marketing agencies. Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.

service_description.title: 1. Service Description
service_description.content: FutureMarketingAI provides an Agent as a Service (AaaS) platform delivering AI Marketing Employee services with pluggable skills. Available skills include Content Creator (blog posts, social content, newsletters), Voice Agent (inbound/outbound calls, appointment booking), Lead Qualifier (chatbot, lead scoring, routing), Social Media Manager (multi-platform scheduling, engagement tracking), Ad Creator (AI-generated static and video ads), and Reporting & Analytics (cross-platform dashboards, weekly reports, anomaly detection). Skills are activated per subscription tier and can be added or removed at any time.

subscription_terms.title: 2. Subscription Terms
subscription_terms.content: Services are offered on a monthly subscription basis across three tiers: Growth (EUR 1,497/mo), Professional (EUR 2,997/mo), and Enterprise (EUR 4,997/mo). All plans include all AI skills. Usage is measured in credits, with each plan including a monthly credit allocation. Additional credits can be purchased in packs. The Founding Member program offers all features at EUR 997/mo with a lifetime pricing lock, limited to 10 agencies. Billing occurs monthly in advance. You may cancel your subscription with 30 days written notice, effective at the end of the current billing cycle.

ai_output_disclaimer.title: 3. AI Output Disclaimer
ai_output_disclaimer.content: All content, recommendations, and outputs generated by your AI Marketing Employee are provided as drafts requiring human review before publication or distribution. FutureMarketingAI does not guarantee the accuracy, originality, factual correctness, or suitability of AI-generated output for any specific purpose. The subscribing agency is solely responsible for reviewing, editing, and approving all AI output before publishing to or on behalf of their clients. AI-generated content should not be relied upon as professional, legal, financial, or medical advice.

liability_limitation.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability_limitation.content: FutureMarketingAI's total aggregate liability arising out of or related to these terms shall not exceed the total fees paid by the subscriber in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim. FutureMarketingAI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, business opportunities, or goodwill. AI-generated output does not constitute professional advice of any kind, and FutureMarketingAI accepts no liability for decisions made based on such output.

data_processing.title: 5. Data Processing
data_processing.content: FutureMarketingAI processes data on behalf of the subscribing agency in accordance with GDPR Article 28. Detailed data processing terms are set forth in the Data Processing Agreement (Verwerkersovereenkomst), which forms an integral part of these terms. The agency, as data controller, is responsible for ensuring that appropriate legal bases exist for the processing of personal data through the FutureMarketingAI platform. A copy of the DPA is available upon request at privacy@futuremarketingai.com.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate the subscription with 30 days written notice. Upon termination, your data export window is 30 calendar days, during which you can download all workspace data, content, reports, and configurations. After the 30-day export period, all agency data, client workspace data, and associated content will be permanently deleted from our systems and sub-processors. FutureMarketingAI may terminate your account immediately for material breach of these terms, including non-payment exceeding 30 days.

governing_law.title: 7. Governing Law and Disputes
governing_law.content: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Netherlands. Any disputes arising from or in connection with these terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Amsterdam, the Netherlands. Before initiating legal proceedings, both parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith negotiation for a period of at least 30 days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: This Privacy Policy describes how Future Marketing AI (FutureMarketingAI) collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data in connection with our AI Marketing Employee platform. FutureMarketingAI is committed to protecting the privacy of our subscribers, their clients, and end users in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Dutch data protection laws. This policy applies to all data processed through our platform and website.

data_collected.title: 1. Data We Collect
data_collected.content: We collect the following categories of personal data: Account data (name, email address, company name, billing information), Client workspace data (brand voice documents, social media account connections, content schedules, target audience profiles), Usage data (platform activity logs, feature usage, execution counts), and AI interaction data (chat messages with AI agents, voice call transcripts, content generation prompts). We do not intentionally collect sensitive personal data (special categories under GDPR Article 9).

purpose_of_processing.title: 2. Purpose of Processing
purpose_of_processing.content: We process personal data for the following purposes: Providing AI Marketing Employee services (content creation, voice agent operations, lead qualification, social media management, ad creation, reporting), improving service quality and AI performance through aggregated usage analysis, billing and subscription management, providing technical support and customer service, and complying with legal obligations including tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements.

legal_basis.title: 3. Legal Basis
legal_basis.content: Our processing of personal data is based on the following legal grounds: Contract performance (GDPR Article 6(1)(b)) for providing our subscribed services, legitimate interest (GDPR Article 6(1)(f)) for service improvement, security monitoring, and fraud prevention, consent (GDPR Article 6(1)(a)) for analytics cookies and optional marketing communications, and legal obligation (GDPR Article 6(1)(c)) for tax and regulatory compliance.

ai_data_processing.title: 4. AI Data Processing
ai_data_processing.content: Our AI Marketing Employee processes data as follows: The Content Creator skill uses client brand voice documents and content briefs to generate marketing content — only the minimum context needed is sent to AI providers. The Voice Agent skill processes call audio for speech recognition and response generation — recordings are retained for 90 days for quality assurance. The Lead Qualifier skill analyzes form submissions and chat messages to score and route leads — lead scoring is advisory and does not make automated decisions. AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) process data under Zero Data Retention policies, meaning your data is not used to train AI models.

sub_processors.title: 5. Sub-processors
sub_processors.content: We use the following key sub-processors to deliver our services: OpenAI (content generation, US with EU Data Privacy Framework certification), Anthropic (content generation, US with EU Data Privacy Framework certification), Supabase (database and authentication, EU region - Frankfurt), Vercel (hosting and CDN, EU and global regions), and Vapi (voice agent processing, US). A complete and current list of sub-processors is maintained in our Data Processing Agreement (DPA). We notify subscribers at least 30 days before adding new sub-processors.

data_retention.title: 6. Data Retention
data_retention.content: Active accounts: All data is retained for the duration of the service agreement. Post-termination: A 30-day data export window is provided, after which all data is permanently deleted. Voice recordings and chat logs: Retained for 90 days after processing for quality assurance and dispute resolution. Platform logs: Retained for 90 days. Backups: Deleted within 30 days after source data deletion. Billing records: Retained as required by Dutch tax law (7 years).

data_subject_rights.title: 7. Your Rights
data_subject_rights.content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to: Access your personal data and receive a copy, rectify inaccurate or incomplete personal data, erase your personal data (right to be forgotten), restrict processing of your personal data, data portability (receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format), object to processing based on legitimate interest, and withdraw consent at any time for consent-based processing. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@futuremarketingai.com. We will respond within 30 days as required by the GDPR.

international_transfers.title: 8. International Data Transfers
international_transfers.content: Some of our sub-processors are located outside the EU/EEA, primarily in the United States. For these transfers, we rely on the following safeguards: The EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF) for certified US companies (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel, Stripe), and Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission where DPF certification is not available. Where possible, we use EU data center regions to minimize international transfers. We monitor legal developments regarding international transfers, including potential challenges to the DPF.

contact.title: 9. Contact and Supervisory Authority
contact.content: Data Controller: Future Marketing AI, the Netherlands. For privacy inquiries, data subject requests, or complaints: privacy@futuremarketingai.com. If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens / AP) at autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content: Our website uses essential cookies required for basic functionality and optional analytics cookies to improve our services. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the website to function. Analytics cookies are only set with your explicit consent. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information accurate and up-to-date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.

meta.title: Memory System — Clyde remembers everything per client | FutureMarketingAI
meta.description: Clyde has persistent memory per client — 4 layers (HOT/WARM/COLD/CONTEXT), per-client isolation, nightly consolidation. Sharper every week, doesn't dilute.

hero.subtitle: The difference between an AI tool and an AI employee is memory. Clyde remembers brand voice, audience, KPI targets and performance history — and gets sharper every week per client.

layers.title: Four layers of memory working together
layers.subtitle: Every conversation, every post, every campaign lands in the right layer. Together they form the working memory of your AI employee.

hot.name: HOT — Working memory
hot.description: The ongoing conversation, the current campaign, the content currently in review. Directly available, no retrieval latency.

warm.name: WARM — Recent context
warm.description: Recently approved posts, KPI reports, feedback rounds. Available for comparison and pattern recognition within the current cycle.

cold.name: COLD — Long-term archive
cold.description: The full historical archive — brand guidelines, past campaigns, old reports. Semantically searchable via embeddings.

context.name: CONTEXT — Structural knowledge
context.description: The core: brand voice, audience persona, KPI targets, brand rules. Only changes on explicit updates — never through a stray conversation.

isolation.title: Per-client isolation — no bleed between brands
isolation.body1: Clyde manages multiple clients and multiple brands without Client A's voice showing up in Client B. Every client gets their own memory namespace, strictly separated at the database level (Supabase RLS) and in the vector store.
isolation.body2: What Clyde learns about a client stays with that client. Your operators only see what they are allowed to see. On cancellation: data is exportable within 24 hours, 30-day retention as safety net, then clean deletion.

decay.title: Decay + dream consolidation — memory stays sharp
decay.decayBody: Not all context remains equally relevant. Old data slowly loses priority following a decay formula — just like human memory. Important patterns stay, noise fades. No info overload, no polluted working memory.
decay.dreamBody: Every night a consolidation ritual runs — the "dream phase". Clyde regroups recent learnings, abstracts patterns, writes strategic insights to structural memory. You wake up with a sharper AI employee.

progress.title: Week 1 versus Week 12
progress.subtitle: The difference between a generic AI tool and an AI employee that knows your clients, visible over time.
progress.week1Body: "Write a caption for client X" — Clyde follows brand guidelines but not always with perfect micro-styling yet. Lots of feedback rounds. You are still spending a lot of time on corrections and fine-tuning.
progress.week12Body: Clyde knows the micro-tics of client X: which emojis yes and no, which opening lines convert, which hashtags perform, which posting times work. First drafts are usable. You review, Clyde executes.

contrast.title: Why this does not work with ChatGPT or Jasper

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT / Claude
chatgpt.body: No client-specific memory. Every session starts blank — you have to repeat brand voice, audience and context with every prompt. Does not work at 20 clients.

jasper.name: Jasper / Copy.ai
jasper.body: Templates yes, limited memory. Knows "your brand voice" but not "your full portfolio with 20 brands". Does not scale with agency scope.

clyde.name: Clyde
clyde.body: Persistent per client, 4 layers, isolation between brands, nightly consolidation. Built for agencies with 10-50 brands. Sharper every week, never dilutes.

cta.title: Want to see how this works for your clients?
cta.subtitle: Book a call — we show the memory layer live on the SkinClarity Club setup and discuss how it fits your portfolio.

meta.title: Apply — Book a call with Daley | FutureMarketingAI
meta.description: Application for a partnership call. Max 20 agencies per year. We review within 3 business days — fit or not, you always get a response.

hero.title: Book a partnership call
hero.subtitle: No self-service. No generic sign-up. We review every application personally and respond within 3 business days — even if it is not a match.

expectations.title: What happens after you apply

step1.title: Review within 3 business days
step1.body: Daley reads every application personally. You get a reply within 72 hours — yes, no or "let us call first".

step2.title: 30 min discovery call
step2.body: Video call about your portfolio, current blockers and whether Clyde realistically fits. No pitch — mutual interview.

step3.title: Fit or not-fit
step3.body: If it fits we start with 4 weeks of onboarding partnership. If not — we refer you to DIY alternatives.

expectations.reassurance: Non-fit applications are not a disappointment. We are deliberately selective to protect quality for both sides.

form.title: Tell us about your agency
form.problemLabel: What is your most urgent problem?
form.problemPlaceholder: E.g.: "We are losing 2 FTE on content production for 15 clients" or "Our SEO has stalled and we have no bandwidth for blogs."
form.privacyNote: We use this data only for the review. No marketing automation, no mailing list, no reselling.
form.successBody: Daley reads your application personally and responds within 3 business days. Check your inbox (and spam folder) for our reply.
form.errorValidation: Please check the fields — some are not fully filled in.
form.errorNetwork: Something went wrong while sending. Try again or email hello@futuremarketingai.com directly.
